kwargs.content: Run the process with process_rule_id 'J09A' for the requesting user. Use any required default parameters if not provided.

content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09A","process_rule":"Process ID: J09A

1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp.
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG.
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   3.1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU".
   3.2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU".
   3.3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU".
   3.4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU".
   3.5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU".
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
9. Send them to the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com.
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com.
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
Process ID: J09A

1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp.
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG.
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   3.1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU".
   3.2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU".
   3.3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU".
   3.4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU".
   3.5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU".
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
9. Send them to the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com.
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com.
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command:
CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS
SELECT d.*, NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG
FROM decision_table d
WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09A%';

UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN eq_count_per_haus.cnt < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
FROM (
  SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS cnt
  FROM J09A_temp
  GROUP BY HAUS
) AS eq_count_per_haus
WHERE J09A_temp.HAUS = eq_count_per_haus.HAUS;
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0;
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599;
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999;
UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld');

CREATE TABLE J09A_work AS
SELECT 
  t.*, 
  eabl."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  eabl.ISTABLART_TXT,
  eabl."Record created on",
  eablg.Installation AS ANLAGE_join,
  eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS EABLG_MR_Doc_No
FROM J09A_temp t
LEFT JOIN eabl ON t.EQUNR = eabl.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN eablg ON eabl."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.";

CREATE TABLE J09A_net_sales AS
WITH net AS (
  SELECT n.*
  FROM net_master n
),
sales AS (
  SELECT s.*
  FROM sales_master s
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(s.EQUNR, n.EQUNR) AS EQUNR,
  COALESCE(s.TITLE, n.TITLE) AS TITLE,
  COALESCE(s.FORENAME, n.FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
  COALESCE(s.SURNAME, n.SURNAME) AS SURNAME,
  COALESCE(s.STREET, n.STREET) AS STREET,
  COALESCE(s.STREETNO, n.STREETNO) AS STREETNO,
  COALESCE(s.CITY1, n.CITY1) AS CITY1,
  COALESCE(s.CITY2, n.CITY2) AS CITY2,
  COALESCE(s.POST_CODE1, n.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1,
  COALESCE(s.EMAIL, n.EMAIL) AS EMAIL,
  CASE WHEN s.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_sales,
  CASE WHEN n.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_net
FROM net
FULL OUTER JOIN sales ON net.EQUNR = sales.EQUNR;
SELECT DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,10) AS sample, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM eabl LIMIT 5;
